Log:
  [NEW PORT] games/libretro-fmsx: FMSX - MSX Emulator

  This is a libretro core for fMSX, one of the oldest MSX1/2/2+ Computers emulators.

  PR:		246120

  Approved by:	tcberner (mentor)
